_help: Sources for the daily aggregator. 'rss' = deal-publisher feeds. 'brand_news' = per-brand Google News RSS (Singapore, promo-filtered) — each item links to the original article. 'involve_asia' = optional merchant-authorised API (also earns commission). For a site without a native feed, generate one free at https://rss.app.
_blocked_help: Publishers to never surface (matched case-insensitively against the source name, the feed's publisher, or the article URL). Add a name or domain fragment here to exclude a blog whose deals are stale or off-brand.
_rss_verification_2026-07-05: Live-checked the deal feeds. ACTIVE (in 'rss' above): SINGPromos + Great Deals Singapore — both returning fresh July-2026 items. PARKED below (do NOT enable without re-checking): SGDtips & MoneyDigest were unreachable; EverydayOnSales' feed surfaced stale 2025 items, which the present-year gate would discard anyway. The bulk of coverage comes from the per-brand Google News scan under 'brand_news'.

brand_news.query_suffix: Singapore (promotion OR deal OR sale OR discount OR offer OR launch)

involve_asia.note: Free to join at involve.asia. Request an API key (Profile > Tools > API), add INVOLVE_API_KEY and INVOLVE_API_SECRET as GitHub repo Secrets, paste your token/offers endpoints above, then set enabled to true.

ai.note: OPTIONAL AI polish of fetched deals (cleaner titles/summaries, category check). It never invents facts. Set AI_API_URL, AI_API_KEY and AI_MODEL as GitHub Secrets, then flip enabled to true. Free OpenAI-compatible providers in 2026: GitHub Models, Groq, Google Gemini.
